query: I am interested in a 7-day travel plan for two people, starting from Fort Lauderdale and covering three cities in Louisiana from March 8th to March 14th, 2022. We have a budget of $4,400. We'd like accommodations that house children under 10 and we'd prefer to have entire rooms to ourselves. Also, we'd like to avoid flights as a mode of transportation for this journey.

plan.current_city: from Fort Lauderdale to New Orleans
plan.transportation: self-driving, from Fort Lauderdale to New Orleans, duration: 11 hours 54 mins, distance: 1,356 km, cost: 67
plan.attraction: New Orleans City Park;Audubon Aquarium;Mardi Gras World;New Orleans Museum of Art;Jackson Square;The National WWII Museum;Audubon Zoo;The Cabildo;Visit New Orleans;St. Louis Cathedral;JAMNOLA;Vue Orleans;Storyland;The Historic New Orleans Collection;The Singing Oak;The Presbytère;New Orleans Historic Voodoo Museum;Longue Vue House & Gardens;Steamboat NATCHEZ;The Skeleton House;
plan.lunch: Jimmy's Pancake House;Sage;Uttarakhand Fast Food;Def Col Social;The Night Owl;Twenty Four Seven;Cakes and Bakes;Yeti - The Himalayan Kitchen;Shama Muradabadi Chicken Corner;Mr. Momo;Bhashi Caterers;Cafe Coffee Day;Green Chick Chop;Aggarwal Bikaner Sweets;Buena Tierra;Kulcha King;Royale Bakers;The Chef;Chef's Basket Pop Up Café;Mineority By Saby;
plan.dinner: Jimmy's Pancake House;Sage;Uttarakhand Fast Food;Def Col Social;The Night Owl;Twenty Four Seven;Cakes and Bakes;Yeti - The Himalayan Kitchen;Shama Muradabadi Chicken Corner;Mr. Momo;Bhashi Caterers;Cafe Coffee Day;Green Chick Chop;Aggarwal Bikaner Sweets;Buena Tierra;Kulcha King;Royale Bakers;The Chef;Chef's Basket Pop Up Café;Mineority By Saby;
plan.accommodation: Lovely One bedroom apartment 20 min to Manhattan;Cozy Renovated 2 Bedroom Apartment Heart of Brklyn;Harlem Short Term Stay;Luxury apartment in Williamsburg;NICE 2 BED APT NEAR TIME SQUARE;
